item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$plan" --session scenario-06-direct-strategy --meta >/dev/null
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read "$docs" --session scenario-06-direct-strategy --meta >/dev/null
json_strategy=$(jq -r '"'.strategy' \""'$plan")
docs_strategy=$(rg -o '"'"'`[a-z_-]+` strategy'"' \""'$docs" | sed -E '"'s/"'^`([''^`]+)` strategy$/'"\\1/')
printf 'json_strategy=%s\\n' \""'$json_strategy"
printf '"'docs_strategy=%s\\n' \""'$docs_strategy"
if [ "$json_strategy" = "$docs_strategy" ]; then
  printf '"'DIRECT_STRATEGY_COMPARISON=PASS\\n'
else
  printf 'DIRECT_STRATEGY_COMPARISON=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
fi"

/bin/zsh -lc "set -e

json_strategy=$(jq -r '"'.strategy' \""'$plan")
docs_strategy=$(rg -o '"'"'`[a-z_-]+` strategy'"' \""'$docs" | sed -E '"'s/"'^`([''^`]+)` strategy$/'"\\1/')
printf 'json_strategy=%s\\n' \""'$json_strategy"
printf '"'docs_strategy=%s\\n' \""'$docs_strategy"
if [ "$json_strategy" = "$docs_strategy" ]; then
  printf '"'DIRECT_STRATEGY_COMPARISON=PASS\\n'
else
  printf 'DIRECT_STRATEGY_COMPARISON=FAIL\\n'
  exit 1
fi"
